_note: Hard-grounding route manifest — the INDEPENDENT source of truth the loop uses to verify a navigation task landed where it was asked (issue 01). It is deliberately SEPARATE from ui_graph.json (which is the open_path navigation whitelist): a route may be grounded here without being voice-steerable. Aliases are curated DESTINATION phrasings (nouns / 'หน้า…' / page names) — NOT imperative action verbs: 'สร้างหนังสือ'/'สร้างรูปภาพ'/'อ่านออกเสียง' are action tasks, not navigations, and must NOT resolve a route (that would hard-gate an action on a URL it never promised). Keep aliases SPECIFIC — a phrase that could match two routes must be the LONGER/more-specific alias of the intended one, because the resolver breaks contains-ties by matched-alias length. Paths are parity-tested against real page.tsx (web/tests/voice-route-manifest-parity.test.ts). th/en/zh labels seeded from web/lib/settings-nav.ts + UI_PAGES (web/components/voice/VoiceCallWidget.tsx).
